subject: The investment opportunity behind the food
preheader: FarmThru is opening to investors on Birchal. Here's what you need to know.
body:
You've seen the food. You've met the farms. Now let's talk about what comes next.

FarmThru is opening an equity crowdfunding campaign on Birchal in July 2026. For the first time, you can own a share of the grocery store you buy from.

Here's where we stand. 50+ regenerative partner farms across NSW. 2,000+ active customers. Brookvale hub operating Monday to Friday. A $130B Australian grocery market where farm-direct food is growing at 24% year-on-year.

The terms. Minimum investment: $50. Maximum cap: $10,000 per investor. Full details, financials, and risk disclosure will be in the offer document on Birchal.

We want to be upfront: investing in early-stage businesses carries risk. You could lose some or all of your investment. We won't downplay that. What we will do is give you every piece of information you need to decide for yourself.

If you want priority access before the campaign opens to everyone, you can secure a VIP spot with a $5 refundable deposit. VIP members get first access to invest, priority updates, and an exclusive Q&A with the founders.

Not financial advice. The disclosure document will be available on Birchal when the campaign launches.

Jeremy
creative_brief: Investment email. Clean design, data-forward. Key metrics displayed as a visual block (50+ farms, 2,000+ customers, $130B market, 24% growth). VIP deposit CTA button below. Birchal badge in footer. Honest, confident tone. No hype.
